summary: Volume Framework & Elite Coaching Engine testing for InterFitAI. All 11 test cases passed (100% success rate). Verified VOLUME_FRAMEWORK set budgets, SETS_PER_EXERCISE allocations, STRENGTH_REST_FLOORS, conditioning finisher anti-bloat, and GOAL_PARAMS rep ranges for strength/build_muscle goals.

minor.issue: strength 30min beginner: last secondary_compound exercise gets only 1 set (Romanian Deadlift = 1 set) due to budget running out. While technically passing the budget constraint, 1 set may be sub-optimal coaching value.

build_muscle 60min intermediate: primary_compound Barbell Bench Press receives 5 sets (4 + focus boost), slightly above SETS_PER_EXERCISE intermediate max of 4, but within the allowed focus_boost_headroom=2 in code.

critical_code_review_comments: strength 45min intermediate: All 3 sessions showed only 4 exercises (not up to the 5 max), with the last secondary_compound getting just 1 set. This is because the budget hits target_sets before filling all slots. Consider whether 1 set for secondary compounds is acceptable, or if the set allocation should ensure at least 2 sets per exercise before including it.
REST FLOORS confirmed working correctly: strength 30min primary_compound rest = 191s (max(150, 225*0.85)) — STRENGTH_REST_FLOORS correctly enforced even for short sessions.
CONDITIONING FINISHER anti-bloat verified: lose_fat sessions correctly reduce max_ex by 1 to make room for finisher, consistently producing 5 lifting + 1 conditioning across all 4 days.
VOLUME_FRAMEWORK lookup uses dur_bucket clamped to {30,45,60,75}. Durations > 75min get the 75 bucket. This is correct behavior.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b
context_for_next_testing_agent: Volume Framework tests are now in /app/backend/tests/test_volume_framework.py. All 8 review scenarios passed: (1) strength 30min beginner = 4 exercises, 11 sets; (2) build_muscle 60min intermediate = 6 exercises, 20 sets; (3) strength rest floors enforced (191s for primary_compound); (4) build_muscle 30min rest scaling correct (accessory=41s, primary=90s); (5) strength 45min intermediate anti-bloat = 4 exercises/session; (6) set allocation per exercise type all within SETS_PER_EXERCISE ranges; (7) lose_fat 45min finisher anti-bloat = 5 lifting + 1 conditioning per day; (8) rep ranges correct for both build_muscle and strength. Minor: last secondary_compound in tight-budget sessions can get squeezed to 1 set.
rca_of_issue: No critical bugs found. The VOLUME_FRAMEWORK, SETS_PER_EXERCISE, and STRENGTH_REST_FLOORS constants are all being correctly applied in build_blueprint(). The session builder correctly allocates sets within budget, trims slots to max_exercises, applies rest floors, and injects conditioning finishers for lose_fat goal.
